summary: Bug fix verified: /profile page no longer crashes for authenticated partners. The missing Star icon import in profile/page.js line 18 has been fixed. Profile page loads successfully showing user info, partner badge, and partner dashboard link.
critical_code_review_comments: Star icon import fix confirmed at /app/app/profile/page.js line 18 - properly added to lucide-react imports
Star icon usage at line 726 in Welcome Partner Modal now works correctly

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Profile page loads without errors for partner user

context_for_next_testing_agent: Profile page bug (Star icon import) is fixed. Partner login works correctly with credentials 86boa@mail.ru / az123456. After login, user redirects to /partner/dashboard. Profile page (/profile) shows user name, email, partner badge, phone number, partner dashboard link, quick actions. The Welcome Partner Modal (which uses Star icon) is shown only for newly approved partners - existing partners see normal profile.

login_flow: Correct redirect to /partner/dashboard after partner login
profile_page: /profile loads without client-side exception for partner user
Partner role badge ('Партнёр') shown in teal color
Partner dashboard link visible with 'Открыть' button
Quick actions: My bookings, Partner panel, Telegram status, Settings, Logout
Security notice card displayed at bottom
bug_fix_verified: Star icon import added at line 18: import { ...Star } from 'lucide-react'
Star icon used at line 726 in Welcome Partner Modal renders without error
No 'Star is not defined' error in console
Profile page compiles successfully (200 status in frontend logs)

environment_notes.preview_url_issue: Preview environment at https://c325362c-1be1-450d-a1ad-cc1fb45ba828.preview.emergentagent.com was returning 502/startup errors during testing. Tests performed on localhost:3000 which works correctly.
environment_notes.memory_pressure: Frontend service restarted once due to memory threshold during testing, but recovered successfully
